databaseUrl.label: PostgreSQL URL
databaseUrl.help: PostgreSQL connection string (or use ${DATABASE_URL}). Shares database with persist-postgres.

auth.jwtSecret.label: JWT Secret (HS256)
auth.jwtSecret.help: Shared secret for verifying HS256 JWTs issued by your app

auth.verifyEndpoint.label: Token Verification Endpoint
auth.verifyEndpoint.help: POST endpoint that validates a token and returns { user_id, first_name, last_name }

auth.passcodeVerifyUrl.label: Passcode Verify URL
auth.passcodeVerifyUrl.help: POST endpoint for verifying 6-digit passcodes (Syntropy Journals)

auth.userLookupUrl.label: User Lookup URL
auth.userLookupUrl.help: GET endpoint for fuzzy name search (returns user list)

auth.apiToken.label: API Token
auth.apiToken.help: API token for authenticating with the Syntropy Journals API
